_comment: SpongeBob SquarePants franchise data file. Covers the main series, films, spin-offs, video games (including defunct mobile titles), major books, and significant media appearances.
description: Stephen Hillenburg's beloved animated series (1999–present) set in the underwater city of Bikini Bottom. A cultural juggernaut spanning over 300 episodes, three theatrical films, multiple spin-offs, and one of the most extensive licensed video game libraries in animation history.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
media.description: The original series. Follows SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward, Mr. Krabs, and Sandy in Bikini Bottom. Post-movie seasons (S4-5) transitioned from the classic era, while later seasons (S9+) saw a creative resurgence.
media.notes: Created by Stephen Hillenburg. Seasons 1-3 (1999-2004) considered the 'golden age.' Series remains in production as of 2026. The 20th anniversary special (SpongeBob's Big Birthday Blowout) aired in 2019.

media.title: Kamp Koral: SpongeBob's Under Years
media.description: CGI-animated prequel series. Follows 10-year-old SpongeBob at summer camp. First SpongeBob spin-off.
media.notes: Announced in 2019. Initially intended for Nickelodeon but moved to Paramount+. Critically mixed reception, but commercially successful.

media.title: The Patrick Star Show
media.description: Talk-show parody series hosted by Patrick from his childhood home. Features his family: Bunny, Cecil, and Squidina.
media.notes: Still in production. Has a more chaotic, absurdist tone reminiscent of the classic series.

media.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
media.description: First theatrical film. SpongeBob and Patrick go to Shell City to retrieve King Neptune's crown. Features the live-action David Hasselhoff sequence.
media.notes: Directed by Stephen Hillenburg. Initially intended as a series finale. Grossed $140M worldwide.

media.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
media.description: Second theatrical film. The Krabby Patty formula is stolen by a pirate (Antonio Banderas). Features a hybrid 2D/3D animation style and a live-action finale.
media.notes: Grossed $325M worldwide. Stephen Hillenburg served as executive producer and writer.

media.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run
media.description: Third theatrical film. SpongeBob and Patrick go on a quest to rescue Gary from Poseidon. Features a mix of 3D CGI and live-action. Serves as a backdoor pilot for Kamp Koral.
media.notes: Originally intended for theatrical release in 2020, sold to Paramount+ due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Released digitally in 2021.

media.title: Saving Bikini Bottom: The Sandy Cheeks Movie
media.description: First character-focused spin-off film. Sandy and SpongeBob travel to Texas to save Bikini Bottom. Netflix original.
media.notes: Released August 2024. Mixed reviews. Part of Nickelodeon's push for direct-to-streaming films.

media.title: Plankton: The Movie
media.description: Spin-off film centered on Plankton's origin story. Netflix original. Reveals his friendship with Karen and their first attempt to steal the Krabby Patty formula.
media.notes: Announced 2024. Scheduled for Netflix release in March 2025. Features Mark Hamill as a new villain.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legend of the Lost Spatula
media.description: Early GBC platformer. SpongeBob navigates the Flying Dutchman's ship to retrieve the Golden Spatula.
media.notes: Published by THQ. Emulatable via Gambatte.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SuperSponge
media.description: 2D side-scroller. SpongeBob collects autographs from his idols. One of the first multiplatform SpongeBob games.
media.notes: GBA version is a completely different game. Emulatable via DuckStation (PS1) and mGBA.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Operation Krabby Patty
media.description: Educational point-and-click adventure. Plankton steals the formula again. Mini-game focused.
media.notes: Windows 9x/XP era. Rarely playable on modern systems without virtualization.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Revenge of the Flying Dutchman
media.description: 3D platformer. The Flying Dutchman curses SpongeBob with a monster form. Open world Bikini Bottom.
media.notes: Console versions differ heavily from GBA. Emulatable via PCSX2, Dolphin.

media.title: Battle for Bikini Bottom
media.description: The defining SpongeBob game. Plankton's robots invade Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy must defeat them.
media.notes: Considered the best SpongeBob game. Remastered in 2020. Emulatable on all platforms.

media.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
media.description: Tie-in game to the 2004 film. Follows the movie plot closely with original levels.
media.notes: Considered the second-best game in the franchise. Heavy Iron's final SpongeBob game.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Lights, Camera, Pants!
media.description: Party game. The Bikini Bottom community theater holds an acting competition. 50+ mini-games.
media.notes: Emulatable via PCSX2, Dolphin.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Creature from the Krusty Krab
media.description: Surreal platformer. SpongeBob and Plankton have nightmares. Levels include giant monster and flying sequences.
media.notes: Wii version uses motion controls. Emulatable via Dolphin.

media.title: SpongeBob's Atlantis SquarePantis
media.description: Tie-in to the TV special. SpongeBob and friends journey to Atlantis.
media.notes: A musical platformer. DS version is a different game.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drawn to Life
media.description: Crossover with the Drawn to Life series. SpongeBob and friends help the Raposa.
media.notes: Rare crossover title. Emulatable via melonDS.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. The Big One
media.description: Tie-in to the TV special. SpongeBob and friends are stranded on a tropical island.
media.notes: 2D side-scroller. Emulatable via melonDS.

media.title: SpongeBob's Truth or Square
media.description: Tie-in to the 10th anniversary special. SpongeBob and friends get locked in the Krusty Krab.
media.notes: Features a hub world called the Krabby Patty Museum. Emulatable via PPSSPP, Dolphin.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Robotic Revenge
media.description: Third-person shooter. Plankton's robots go haywire. 4-player co-op.
media.notes: Uses the voice cast from the show. Mediocre reception.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Patrick Star Game
media.description: Open-world sandbox game. Control Patrick in Bikini Bottom, causing chaos and completing physics-based objectives.
media.notes: Released October 2024. Latest major SpongeBob console release.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom – Rehydrated
media.description: Full remake of the 2003 classic. Updated graphics, new multiplayer horde mode, and restored cut content.
media.notes: Multiplayer mode is the scrapped 'Robo Squidward' boss fight. Widely praised.

media.title: SpongeBob Moves In!
media.description: City-builder. Rebuild Bikini Bottom after Plankton attacks. Similar to The Simpsons: Tapped Out. DEFUNCT.
media.notes: Removed from app stores in 2017. The most prominent defunct SpongeBob mobile game.

media.title: SpongeBob Diner Dash
media.description: Diner Dash style game. Manage the Krusty Krab. DEFUNCT.
media.notes: Removed from stores. No longer playable.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sponge on the Run (Mobile Tie-In)
media.description: Endless runner. Tie-in to the 2020 film. DEFUNCT.
media.notes: Removed from stores shortly after the film's delayed release.

media.title: SpongeBob: Krusty Cook-Off
media.description: Time-management cooking game. Build and manage restaurants across Bikini Bottom.
media.notes: Most commercially successful modern SpongeBob mobile game. Still actively updated as of 2026.

media.title: SpongeBob: Patty Pursuit
media.description: Apple Arcade exclusive runner. 2D auto-runner with combat elements.
media.notes: Still available on Apple Arcade.

media.title: SpongeBob: Get Cooking
media.description: Sequel to Krusty Cook-Off. New story mode, new restaurants.
media.notes: Apple Arcade version is ad-free. Standard version has IAP.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Monopoly
media.description: Monopoly reskin. Bikini Bottom properties, custom Krusty Krab money, collectible tokens.
media.notes: Multiple editions exist: Original 2008, Collector's Edition 2019, and a 2024 'Houseless' edition. Can be played via Tabletop Simulator mods.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Game of Life
media.description: Game of Life reskin. SpongeBob-themed paths and Jellyfish cards.
media.notes: Out of print. Tabletop Simulator mod available.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sorry!
media.description: Sorry! reskin. Bikini Bottom themed board and pawns.
media.notes: Rare. Not widely preserved.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Unauthorized Fun-ography
media.description: Oral history and retrospective of the franchise by journalist Paul Volponi. Traces the series from inception through the post-Hillenburg era.
media.notes: Non-fiction. Published by McFarland & Company. The most comprehensive English-language SpongeBob history book.

media.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Experience: A Deep Dive into the World of Bikini Bottom
media.description: Illustrated behind-the-scenes book. Interviews with writers, animators, and voice actors. Published for the 25th anniversary.
media.notes: Published by Titan Books. 240 pages. Includes concept art and production materials.

media.title: SpongeBob Comics (United Plankton Pictures / Bongo Comics)
media.description: Official SpongeBob comic series. 80+ issues (including specials and annuals). Published by Stephen Hillenburg's United Plankton Pictures in partnership with Bongo Comics (The Simpsons).
media.notes: Ran 2011–2018. Creators include James Kochalka, Sam Henderson, and many indie cartoonists. The only comic series directly approved and developed by Hillenburg.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Complete Guide Series
media.description: Early chapter book series published by Simon Spotlight/Nickelodeon. Episode novelizations and original stories.
media.notes: Targeted at young readers. Out of print.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener
media.description: High-production fan series. Animated entirely in Source Filmmaker. Darker, serialized take on SpongeBob.
media.notes: Notable for its production quality. Canceled after 12 episodes due to creator burnout.

media.title: SpongeBob: Bikini Bottom Horror
media.description: Viral fan comic series. Patrick becomes a cosmic-horror entity. One of the most famous SpongeBob fan works.
media.notes: Created by u/stillinthesimulation on Reddit. Published as webcomic 2019-2020. Had a physical printing through a crowdfunded campaign.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Complete Audio Collection
media.description: CD audiobook series. Full-cast readings with the show's voice actors. Included original sound effects and music.
media.notes: Published by Simon & Schuster Audio. Out of print, rare digital preservation exists.

media.title: The SpongeBob Musical (Original Cast Recording)
media.description: Broadway musical adaptation. Songs by Yolanda Adams, Steven Tyler, Sara Bareilles, and others. The cast album is a substantial audio performance work.
media.notes: Released by Sony Masterworks. Nominated for 12 Tony Awards. Available on all streaming platforms.

media.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shorts
media.description: Series of 1-3 minute animated shorts. Aired between main series episodes and on social media. Covers holidays, DIY segments, and music videos.
media.notes: Not considered canon. Includes 'Krusty Krab Training Video' style shorts and stop-motion specials.
